semantic.role: Constants and template definitions module for ArchSpine's agent briefing blocks, MCP tools documentation, health snapshot content, and managed ignore-file entries (.gitignore, .spineignore, .gitattributes, .ignore).
responsibilities: Define unique block start/end markers for embedding ArchSpine sections (v1 agent instructions, V2 knowledge graph briefing, MCP tools, health snapshot) into markdown documents.
Provide pre-assembled block strings (ARCHSPINE_AGENT_BLOCK, ARCHSPINE_V2_BRIEFING_BLOCK, ARCHSPINE_MCP_TOOLS_BLOCK, ARCHSPINE_HEALTH_BLOCK) for direct injection into agent instruction files.
Supply content arrays (ARCHSPINE_V2_BRIEFING_CONTENT, ARCHSPINE_MCP_TOOLS_CONTENT, ARCHSPINE_HEALTH_CONTENT) that form the inner text of those blocks.
Define file paths (SEARCH_IGNORE_PATH, SPINEIGNORE_PATH) for the .ignore and .spineignore files.
Provide recommended ignore lines for .spineignore (SPINEIGNORE_RECOMMENDED_LINES) and .gitignore (LOCAL_GITIGNORE_LINES), plus block start/end delimiters for managed sections.
Provide .gitignore and .gitattributes block start/end markers (GITIGNORE_BLOCK_START/END, GITATTRIBUTES_BLOCK_START/END) to encapsulate ArchSpine-managed regions.
Supply the full concatenated SEARCH_IGNORE_CONTENT for the .ignore file from the SEARCH_IGNORE_LINES list.
outOfScope: Writing or patching ignore files to disk — that is the responsibility of infra modules (spine-gate, fs-utils).
Rendering or injecting agent blocks into output documents — that is done by agent-instructions sync and view renderers.
Validating that the block start/end markers match or that ignore file content is correct — no validation logic here.
invariants: Block start markers (e.g., AGENT_BLOCK_START, ARCHSPINE_V2_BLOCK_START) are fixed strings that must not change to remain consistent with parsers and view renderers that match them.
Ignore line lists (SEARCH_IGNORE_LINES, SPINEIGNORE_RECOMMENDED_LINES, LOCAL_GITIGNORE_LINES) reflect the current set of ArchSpine-managed exclusions and are kept in sync across the repository.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize all ArchSpine-managed textual definitions (block markers, agent blocks, MCP tool overview, health snapshot content, and ignore file entries) in a single constants module to enable consistent injection and easy modification.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added '.mcp.json' to the LOCAL_GITIGNORE_LINES array so that the managed .gitignore block includes the new MCP configuration file that ArchSpine generates, preventing it from being committed inadvertently.

publicSurface.description: Exported type (likely an enum or union) that defines strategies for resolving artifact content paths. Used by artifact resolution logic.
Markdown comment marker indicating the start of the ArchSpine agent instruction block.
Markdown comment marker indicating the end of the ArchSpine agent instruction block.
Pre-built full agent instruction block with start/end markers and instructions for AI agents interacting with the repository.
Markdown comment marker indicating the start of the V2 knowledge graph briefing block.
Markdown comment marker indicating the end of the V2 knowledge graph briefing block.
Array of lines forming the V2 knowledge graph briefing content (availability notice).
Pre-built V2 knowledge graph briefing block with start/end markers.
Markdown comment marker indicating the start of the MCP tools overview block.
Markdown comment marker indicating the end of the MCP tools overview block.
Array of lines forming the MCP tools overview text describing available MCP tools.
Pre-built MCP tools overview block with start/end markers.
Markdown comment marker indicating the start of the health snapshot block.
Markdown comment marker indicating the end of the health snapshot block.
Array of lines forming the health snapshot content (system health summary).
Pre-built health snapshot block with start/end markers.
File name constant for the custom .ignore file used by ArchSpine's search mechanism to exclude noisy directories.
File name constant for the .spineignore file that controls semantic scanning of the repository.
Array of lines for the .ignore file, excluding generated and low-signal paths from agent workspace search.
Complete newline-separated string content for the .ignore file built from SEARCH_IGNORE_LINES.
Comment marker line indicating the start of the ArchSpine-recommended section in .spineignore.
Comment marker line indicating the end of the ArchSpine-recommended section in .spineignore.
Array of recommended lines for .spineignore including block markers and exclusion patterns for generated, local, and high-noise files.
Comment marker line indicating the start of the ArchSpine-managed section in .gitignore.
Comment marker line indicating the end of the ArchSpine-managed section in .gitignore.
Comment marker line indicating the start of the ArchSpine-managed section in .gitattributes.
Comment marker line indicating the end of the ArchSpine-managed section in .gitattributes.
Array of .gitignore lines for ArchSpine-managed files (cache.db, lock file, etc.), including the .mcp.json entry.
